---
title: 'Benchmark: Linear Mixed Model (LMM)'
author: 'Kenichi Satoh'
date: "Last updated: `r format(Sys.time(), '%Y/%m/%d')`"
output:
  word_document:
    fig_width: 12
    fig_height: 12
    toc: no
---

This script reproduces the LMM benchmark results in Section 4.1
of "Wild Bootstrap Inference for Non-Negative Matrix Factorization
with Random Effects" (Satoh, 2026).

```{r, dpi=300, eval=TRUE, echo=TRUE, warning=FALSE, error=FALSE, message=TRUE}
library(nlme)

data(Orthodont)  # Dataset from the nlme package
str(Orthodont)
Orthodont$age <- Orthodont$age - mean(Orthodont$age)
# Random intercept + slope for age by Subject, with Sex interaction
fit_reml <- lme(
  fixed  = distance ~ age * Sex,
  random = ~ age | Subject,
  data   = Orthodont,
  method = "REML"
)

summary(fit_reml)
anova(fit_reml)        # Fixed effects tests
intervals(fit_reml)    # Confidence intervals (including variance components)
```
